title: Noah Is Stopped
description: On pages 14–17, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8. The central beat is noah is stopped.
scene: The scene focuses on noah is stopped, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...and destroy it once and for all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: All right!! It's in the bubble!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: My crew and jimbei had decided together...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...that we weren't going to let anybody...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: leave it all to me, bro-hosh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Guys, what are you stopping for?!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: I'm gonna stay on the island ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: WH... What are you talking about?!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Luffy-sama, the Noah is surrounded by air!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I'll finish this up nice and quickly!!!

summary: Noah Is Stopped. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
